mnemonics.title: Linear vs Binary
mnemonics.content: Linear = Look at All = O(n). Binary = Break in Half = O(log n). Linear works on Any data. Binary needs Sorted data.

mnemonics.title: Binary Search Steps
mnemonics.content: CME: Compare with Middle, Eliminate half, repeat. If key < mid, go left. If key > mid, go right.

mnemonics.title: Search Complexities
mnemonics.content: Linear: Best O(1) Worst O(n). Binary: Best O(1) Worst O(log n).

mnemonics.title: Prerequisites
mnemonics.content: Linear: NONE needed. Binary: SORTED data + RANDOM access needed.
